title: Up The Hill Backwards
content:
Up The Hill Backwards


First Draft



Anthony parks the car and proceeds to work up the nerve to venture outside the car via the only way he knows how:

get higher.

Anthony unloads his trunk.

To completely move the contents, three trips up a flight of stairs are required.

Anthony stumbles in--a few minutes late--through the front door

of Chris’ apartment, finding the occupant in a state of mad, manic creation.

The click-clacking of keys shrinks Anthony’s arrival;

This includes the movement of case upon case of equipment from the hall to the living room floor.

Chris pauses at the bud of a wonderous seed...

falters,

Before noting an other’s presence.

Sunken by Anthony’s sudden--yet expected--arrival,

Chris sweeps himself away from his work desk as if he never meant to be attached to this passion to begin with,
context: From document: Up The Hill Backwards — chunk 1 (chunk 1/5)
